name: ChatVLSC Worker Response Security Policy

shared.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), serial=()

html.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.thevlsc.com https://mcp.thevlsc.com https://chatvlsc.thevlsc.com

notes: This policy does not enforce authentication or replace Cloudflare Access.
Inline script/style are currently allowed because the Worker UI is a single-file page.
No API keys, service tokens, or verification TXT values are stored in this file.
